title: psychrogeton lumbricoides
intro: Psychrogeton lumbricoides, also known as ground pine, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, easing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Ground pine can be prepared into teas, infusions, or dried for use in herbal remedies, and its extracts have been studied for potential antimicrobial and antioxidant properties.
